hero.title: Capture every thought.
hero.subtitle: Deepink is a <0>privacy focused</0> note taking app with a workflow that moves at the speed of light.

encryption.title: Bulletproof vault
encryption.text:
Everything in your vault is encrypted. Unlike many apps, that truly means <0>all your data</0>, including files and metadata. Choose the encryption algorithm you trust.

Deepink is <1>open source</1> and welcomes independent security audits.

workflow.title: Workflow at the speed of light
workflow.text: We measure every click and key press, then remove the extra steps. For most tasks, Deepink cuts the number of actions by up to 80% compared to other note taking apps.

universality.title: Everything in one place
universality.text: Create a vault with a strong password once, move all your notes, and keep everything there. Workspaces and nested tags help you organize, separate, and instantly find anything, including a daily journal, private strategy notes, research, fitness tracking, and more.

intro.title: Structure your thinking
intro.text: Capture a quick insight or build something complex. Deepink brings order, focus, and structure to every idea.

links.title: Links
links.text:
Copy a link to any note and reference it anywhere in your vault. Connect meeting notes to decisions, research to conclusions, and plans to execution, without repeating the same information.

Everything stays in sync. Update a note once and every reference stays accurate.

Deepink shows every place a note is mentioned, so you can trace connections and navigate your knowledge naturally.

Your information should not be isolated. With Links, it becomes a network.

workspaces.title: Workspaces
workspaces.text:
Separate your world without splitting your vault.

Workspaces let you create focused areas inside one secure vault. Unlock once, then switch between contexts like Client Projects, Personal Journal, Health Tracking, or Learning, without overlap.

Everything stays organized and context specific. Share your screen in a meeting with confidence, knowing private or sensitive areas will not surface by accident.

One vault. Clear boundaries. Zero friction.

history.title: History
history.text:
Every note keeps its own timeline.

Deepink automatically saves previous versions, so you can review what changed, restore an earlier draft, or track how an idea evolved. Whether it was edited yesterday or a year ago, nothing important is lost.

History lets you refine and rewrite with confidence. Every step is preserved and ready when you need it.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.text:
Attach a reminder to any note and get notified at the right time.

Set follow up reminders for meeting notes, deadlines for project plans, renewal dates for documents, or check ins for personal goals. Each reminder stays attached to the exact note, not hidden as a separate task in another app.

When the time comes, you return straight to the note with every detail in place.

Reminders help you act on your information, not just store it.

tags.title: Nested tags
tags.text:
Structure your notes with tags that match real hierarchies.

Nested tags let you create parent and child relationships, so broad themes can contain specific subtopics. For example, Clients can include individual client tags, and Finance can branch into Taxes, Invoices, and Reports. This keeps top level areas clean while still allowing detailed classification.

Unlike folders or single category systems, notes can have multiple tags at once. A single note can belong to a client, relate to a finance topic, and connect to a time period, all without duplication.

Nested tags give you precise organization with the flexibility to reflect how information overlaps.

encryption.title: Encryption
encryption.text:
Your entire vault is encrypted, not just parts of it.

Deepink encrypts everything: notes, attached files, workspaces, and metadata. Many apps only encrypt synced data or note text. Deepink protects the full structure of your vault.

Attachments are never left exposed. Metadata is not readable. Even file sizes are obfuscated to reduce the risk of analysis.

What you store stays private by design.

cta.title: A space for every context
cta.text: One space for everyday life, one for books, one for plans. Switch contexts with one click, stay organized, and keep writing without stopping to decide where a note belongs.
